<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Embeddings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/embeddings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get embeddings from a deployment using the provided input.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"description":"Provide your input for embeddings","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","example":"YOUR_DEPLOYMENT_NAME","description":"Name of the deployment"},"input":{"oneOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}],"example":"What is the capital of France?","description":"A string or array of strings to get embeddings for"}},"required":["model","input"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful operation","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"embedding":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"number"},"description":"The embedding vector"}}}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Invalid Input error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","error"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","example":400},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Bad request"}},"title":"ApiErrorInvalidInput"}}}},"404":{"description":"Not Found error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","error","code"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","example":404},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Not found"},"code":{"type":"string","example":"object_not_found"}},"title":"ApiErrorNotFound"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
